message:
ci: remove dorny/test-reporter causing permission errors

The dorny/test-reporter@v1 action was failing with:
  HttpError: Resource not accessible by integration

This was causing the entire CI to fail even though all 1472 tests
passed. Removed it since we already have:
- Test summary step that reports to GitHub Step Summary
- Artifact upload with JUnit XML for debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -152,15 +152,6 @@ jobs:
           retention-days: 14
           if-no-files-found: ignore
 
-      - name: Test Report Summary
-        if: always()
-        uses: dorny/test-reporter@v1
-        with:
-          name: Unit Tests
-          path: target/nextest/ci/junit.xml
-          reporter: java-junit
-          fail-on-error: false
-
   coverage:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: check
